name: adaptable-rag
description: A configurable profile-driven RAG core with provenance, access boundaries, traces, and evals.

scripts.evals: npm run build && node scripts/run-evals.mjs --baseline profiles/eval-baseline.json --report-dir .rag/eval-runs/latest
scripts.evals:update-baseline: npm run build && node scripts/run-evals.mjs --update-baseline profiles/eval-baseline.json --report-dir .rag/eval-runs/latest
scripts.alerts:deliver: npm run build && node scripts/deliver-alerts.mjs --alerts .rag/slo/latest/alerts.json --report-dir .rag/alert-delivery/latest --mode dry-run
scripts.review:sync: npm run build && node scripts/sync-review-tickets.mjs --queue .rag/human-review/latest/queue.json --ledger .rag/review-ledger/latest/ledger.json --report-dir .rag/review-sync/latest --mode dry-run
scripts.support:knowledge:auto: npm run build && npm run support:knowledge:auto:run
scripts.support:ingest:auto: npm run build && npm run support:ingest:auto:run
scripts.support:ingest:auto:run: RAG_APP_PROFILE_PRESET=sample-support RAG_APPROVED_KNOWLEDGE_ARTIFACTS_PATH=.rag/support-knowledge/latest/approved-knowledge.sources.json RAG_INDEX_KIND=json_file RAG_INDEX_PATH=.rag/support-knowledge/index.json RAG_INDEX_PRETTY=true RAG_MODEL_PROVIDER=json-chat RAG_MODEL_MODEL_NAME=ingest-placeholder RAG_MODEL_ENDPOINT=https://provider.example.invalid/v1/chat RAG_MODEL_API_KEY=ingest-placeholder RAG_RERANK_PROVIDER=json-chat RAG_RERANK_MODEL_NAME=rerank-placeholder RAG_RERANK_ENDPOINT=https://provider.example.invalid/v1/rerank RAG_RERANK_API_KEY=rerank-placeholder RAG_APP_EMBEDDING_MODE=disabled RAG_APP_VISUAL_EMBEDDING_MODE=disabled RAG_APP_GROUNDING_JUDGE_MODE=disabled RAG_HTTP_AUTH_MODE=disabled RAG_HTTP_LOG_MODE=disabled node dist/runtime/production-cli.js ingest --tenant-id sample --namespace-id sample-support --user-id rag_support_sync --principal-namespace-id sample-support --role support --tag auto-ticket-sync --tag known-issues --source-id approved_knowledge_sample-support --overwrite replace --run-id support_knowledge_auto_ingest
scripts.excel:parser-quality: npm run build && npm run excel:test-corpus && node scripts/run-parser-quality-report.mjs --sources .rag/excel-parser-corpus/local-files.sources.json --report-dir .rag/excel-parser-corpus/parser-quality
scripts.excel:stress: npm run excel:test-corpus && node scripts/run-parser-quality-report.mjs --sources .rag/excel-parser-corpus/local-files.sources.json --report-dir .rag/excel-parser-corpus/parser-quality && npm run excel:validate
scripts.excel:visual-retrieval-smoke: npm run build && npm run excel:test-corpus && node scripts/run-excel-visual-retrieval-smoke.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run deployment:check && npm run company:validate && npm run company:smoke && npm run test:coverage && npm run evals && npm run replay:eval && npm run slo:check && npm run alerts:deliver && npm run incident:bundle && npm run review:queue && npm run review:ledger && npm run review:sync && npm run review:reconcile && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
